results.title: New Louisiana law seeks to protect young athletes as NIL opportunities grow
results.description: A new Louisiana law aimed at protecting student-athletes and their families from potential exploitation in name, image and likeness (NIL) deals is now in effect.

results.title: Two children killed, four injured as lightning strikes house in Khyber
results.description: Khyber - Two children were killed and four others injured when lightning struck a house in Naikai Shan Khel, Bazaar Zakha Khel, Tehsil Landi Kotal, on Wednesday, local residents and hospital officials said.

results.title: Online portal launched to connect KP farmers with agriculture adviser
results.description: Peshawar - Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s Adviser to the Chief Minister for Agriculture, Mian Muhammad Umar, on Wednesday announced the launch of an online portal enabling farmers to submit complaints, suggestions and queries directly to his office, while reaffirming the provincial government’s commitment to modernising agriculture.

results.title: World Bank-backed tourism road projects reviewed
results.description: PESHAWAR - The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa government and a World Bank delegation on Wednesday reviewed progress on road infrastructure projects under the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Integrated Tourism Development Project (KITE), with officials stressing the need for timely completion and strict adherence to construction standards.

results.title: Paul Skenes lasts 4 innings, allows a season-high 7 earned runs vs the Phillies
results.description: Pittsburgh ace Paul Skenes continues to struggle. He had his worst outing of the season on Wednesday night, lasting only four innings against the Philadelphia Phillies and allowing a season-high seven earned runs. Since beating Colorado 3-1 on May 12...

results.title: Columbus Parks & Rec Deletes Post Claiming City Hall Would Raise Somalia Flag Before America 250
results.description: Current and former Republican officials criticized the Columbus, Ohio, Parks and Recreation Department on Wednesday after its X account posted, then deleted, a Somali Independence Day message that a city spokesperson confirmed to Breitbart News inaccurately that City Hall would raise Somalia’s flag. results.title: Bosnia-Herzegovina coach grabs ball, gets yellow card as he flips out in World Cup loss to USMNT
results.description: The Bosnian manager was irate and grabbed the ball after the refs didn’t blow the whistle following a physical play in their loss to the United States.
